command.description: The value for the key command must be set_config

command_id.description: A unique ID that will be echoed back in the command response by the reader.

payload.description: At least one of GPIO-LED or READER-GATEWAY must be provided.

GPIO-LED.title: GPIO-LED configuration
GPIO-LED.description:
GPIO-LED module configuration

Configure GPO and LED behaviour based on Events generated

Supported Events:
1. GPI_1_L: event raised when GPI 1 changed from HIGH to LOW
2. GPI_1_H: event raised when GPI 1 changed from LOW to HIGH
3. GPI_2_L: event raised when GPI 2 changed from HIGH to LOW
4. GPI_2_H: event raised when GPI 2 changed from LOW to HIGH
5. CLOUD_DISCONNECT: event raised when reader is disconnected from cloud
6. CLOUD_CONNECT: event raised when reader is connected to cloud
7. TAG_READ: event raised when a tag is read
8. RADIO_START: event raised when inventory operation started using START API
9. RADIO_STOP: event raised when inventory operation stopped using STOP API

1.description: set default state for GPO pin 1

2.description: set default state for GPO pin 2

3.description: set default state for GPO pin 3

4.description: set default state for GPO pin 4

GPI_1_H.title: GPO-LED Action
GPI_1_H.description: Array of GPO or LED actions. Actions will be performed sequentially.

anyOf.title: GPO Action
anyOf.description:
Configuration to define operations on single GPO.

GPO Action will be skipped if conditions provided is not satisfied.

postActionState.description: Desired GPO pin state after action execution completed

blink.title: Action Blink Configuration
blink.description: action blink configuration for GPO or LED

ON.description: SET GPO or LED to desired state for ON (milliseconds) duration

OFF.description: Toggle GPO or LED for OFF(milliseconds) duration

DURATION.description: Total duration in milliseconds to perform blink. 0 will blink GPO or LED forever

oneOf.title: Conditions Array
oneOf.description:
Predefined conditions

IS_CLOUD_CONNECTED  : Condition will be true when reader is successfully connected to Cloud.

~IS_CLOUD_CONNECTED : Condition will be true when reader lost Cloud connectivity.

IS_RADIO_ONGOING    : Condition will be true when the reader is currently performing or has started an inventory operation.

~IS_RADIO_ONGOING   : Condition will be true when the reader is not performing inventory or has stopped an inventory operation.

operator.description: Operator to be used for conditions validation

~IS_RADIO_ONGOING   : Condition will be true when the reader is not performing inventory or has stopped an inventory operation.

conditions.title: Action Conditions
conditions.description:
Predefined conditions to trigger GPO or LED actions

Default "and" operator is used when array of conditions is provided.

operator "and": Action is performed only when all the conditions provided is true.
operator "or": Action is performed only when one of the conditions provided is true.

anyOf.title: LED Action
anyOf.description:
Configuration to define operations on single LED.

LED Action will be skipped if conditions provided is not satisfied.

postActionColor.description: Desired LED color after action expired

postActionColor.description: Desired LED color after action expired

blink.title: Action Blink Configuration
blink.description: action blink configuration for GPO or LED

ON.description: SET GPO or LED to desired state for ON (milliseconds) duration

OFF.description: Toggle GPO or LED for OFF(milliseconds) duration

DURATION.description: Total duration in milliseconds to perform blink. 0 will blink GPO or LED forever

oneOf.title: Conditions Array
oneOf.description:
Predefined conditions

IS_CLOUD_CONNECTED  : Condition will be true when reader is successfully connected to Cloud.

~IS_CLOUD_CONNECTED : Condition will be true when reader lost Cloud connectivity.

IS_RADIO_ONGOING    : Condition will be true when the reader is currently performing or has started an inventory operation.

~IS_RADIO_ONGOING   : Condition will be true when the reader is not performing inventory or has stopped an inventory operation.

operator.description: Operator to be used for conditions validation

operands.title: Conditions Array
operands.description:

IS_CLOUD_CONNECTED  : Condition will be true when reader is successfully connected to Cloud.

~IS_RADIO_ONGOING   : Condition will be true when the reader is not performing inventory or has stopped an inventory operation.

conditions.title: Action Conditions
conditions.description:
Predefined conditions to trigger GPO or LED actions

Default "and" operator is used when array of conditions is provided.

operator "and": Action is performed only when all the conditions provided is true.
operator "or": Action is performed only when one of the conditions provided is true.

RADIO_STOP.title: GPO-LED Action
RADIO_STOP.description: Array of GPO or LED actions. Actions will be performed sequentially.

anyOf.title: GPO Action
anyOf.description:
Configuration to define operations on single GPO.

GPO Action will be skipped if conditions provided is not satisfied.

postActionState.description: Desired GPO pin state after action execution completed

READER-GATEWAY.description: Cloud gateway configuration. Must contain at least one of: endpointConfig, batching, retention, or managementEventConfig.

endpointConfig.description: Endpoint connections configuration. Only the data endpoint is configurable via this API.

batching.description: Global batching configuration applied across all data endpoints. Can be a single object (applied to all endpoints) or an array of objects (one per endpoint, array length must match number of data endpoint connections).

oneOf.description: Single batching config applied to all data endpoints

maxPayloadSizePerReport.description: Maximum payload size in bytes (0 - 256000). -1 to disable.

reportingInterval.description: Report interval in milliseconds (0 - 86400000). -1 to disable.

oneOf.description: Per-endpoint batching config (one entry per data endpoint connection)

retention.description: Global retention configuration for data events on connection loss. Can be a single object (applied to all endpoints) or an array of objects (one per endpoint, array length must match number of data endpoint connections).

oneOf.description: Single retention config applied to all data endpoints

maxEventRetentionTimeInMin.description: Maximum event retention time in minutes (0 - 10080). 0 or -1 retains forever.

maxNumEvents.description: Maximum number of events to retain (0 - 150000).

throttle.description: Rate in events/sec to replay retained events on reconnect (0 - 1000).

oneOf.description: Per-endpoint retention config (one entry per data endpoint connection)
NTP offset warnings config
NTP sync warning alerts

payload.title: Reader Configuration
